CVE-2018-3719.title: mixin-deep node module before 1.3.1 suffers from a Modification o ...
CVE-2018-3719.description: mixin-deep node module before 1.3.1 suffers from a Modification of Assumed-Immutable Data (MAID) vulnerability, which allows a malicious user to modify the prototype of "Object" via __proto__, causing the addition or modification of an existing property that will exist on all objects.
